title: Verify Remind Me toggle sends WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends
description: Test that enabling the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle creates a reminder that triggers at correct time
preconditions: User has active trial with more than 24 hours remaining
User is in Trial Corner Hub

steps.description: 2. Locate 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle in Manage Trial section
3. Toggle the reminder option to ON

expected_result: Reminder is saved and user receives WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial expiration
